channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Saturday, July 4 (game #1622)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Saturday, July 4 (game #1119)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Saturday, July 4 (game #853)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: How to watch Colombia vs Ghana: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time for FIFA World Cup 2026 as Los Cafeteros take on Black Stars
item.description: Here's how to watch Colombia vs Ghana for free online and from anywhere at the FIFA World Cup 2026, as Kansas City plays host to an intriguing last-32 clash.

item.title: How to photograph fireworks: my 5 expert tips for getting your best shots on the landmark 250th Independence Day
item.description: Follow my 5 expert tips for taking fabulous fireworks photos this Independence Day, with your smartphone or camera

item.title: Quote of the day by Studio Ghibli co-founder Hayao Miyazaki on AI: "I strongly feel that this is an insult to life itself" — decrying the rise of machine-made art
item.description: One of the world's most renowned illustrators has previously described the rise of AI-generated content as the end of an era for human creativity

item.title: The only AI glossary you’ll need this year
item.description: The rise of AI has brought an avalanche of new terms and slang. Here is a glossary with definitions of some of the most important words and phrases you might encounter.
